action.reasoning: Observation: train.py failed with device mismatch error because preprocess_obs returns CPU tensors, but QNetwork is on GPU and input tensors aren't moved to device. Also grid_sample coordinates are normalized based on input image size (64x64) instead of feature map size (16x16), causing incorrect feature sampling and zero learning signal. Analysis: need to fix device placement (move tensors to device before forward) and correct coordinate normalization to feature map grid. Also replay buffer storing variable-length neighbors requires per-sample training (no batching yet). Decision: rewrite train.py with device fix, implement per-sample training loop, add checkpoint saving; fix utils.py coordinate normalization to feature map; minor fixes in predict.py for model loading. Run training for 100 episodes to verify pipeline, then submit eval.
